[cron:05e15469-ec7e-408f-91ac-8ac863b548d8 agent-5-morning-pipeline-report-0645] Reminder: compile the daily job acquisition report.

Input files:
- outputs/revops/company_intelligence.json
- outputs/revops/decision_makers.json
- outputs/revops/outreach_drafts.json
- reports/interview_trigger_queue.json

Required outputs:
- reports/morning_job_pipeline.json
- reports/morning_job_pipeline.md

Required fields in JSON:
- companies_discovered
- decision_makers_identified
- job_roles_identified
- outreach_drafts_generated
- confidence_scores
- warnings (include STAGNATION_ALERT if thresholds missed)
- evidence block (path, size, timestamp, artifact counts)

Quality floor:
- >=5 relevant companies
- >=10 decision makers
- >=5 outreach drafts
- min relevance score 60

If outputs missing/invalid, return NO_ARTIFACTS_CREATED.
Current time: Tuesday, March 10th, 2026 — 6:45 AM (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-10 11:45 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
